strategic_objective: Determine if the dominant single port in the DDoS class reflects a genuine attack pattern or sampling artifact influenced by duplication and class imbalance.
key_checks: Analyze class-conditioned distribution stability of Destination Port across partitions
Quantify impact of duplicated rows on port distribution skew and entropy measures
Examine relationship between class imbalance and distributional divergence in Destination Port
Check for local consistency and dependency concentration around dominant port values
success_criteria: Clear differentiation between genuine attack pattern and dataset artifact in port distribution
Bounded insight into how duplication and imbalance affect distributional skew
Identification of stable versus unstable distributional signals in Destination Port
router_constraints: preserve evidence references e1, e2, e33
